headline: Exelon Weighs Efficiency Gains And Data Center Demands On Grid Plans
summary: ComEd, an Exelon subsidiary, and Ferrero have partnered on an efficiency project that is expected to deliver sizable long term electricity and emissions savings. Utilities, including NasdaqGS:EXC, are responding to surging grid stress tied to rapid data center growth and emerging regulatory measures. New demand from data centers and so called phantom data centers is adding pressure on U.S. grid infrastructure and on how projects are planned and financed. For investors following...
